title: Can muscle turn into fat, or fat into muscle?
mythOrTruthText: Fat cannot turn into muscle, and muscle cannot turn into fat. They are two different kinds of tissue, so what really happens is that you can lose fat while building muscle, or lose muscle while gaining fat.

title: Eating carrots can give you a night vision?
mythOrTruthText: No, it's a Myth. While carrots are good for your eyes because they help your body make vitamin A, but they will not magically let you see in the dark like a superhero.
